hero.headline: The Skool of <accent>Fitness.</accent>

hero.description: Jimmy isn’t a management tool. It’s the retention platform for modern coaches — Hyrox, CrossFit, functional. Structured workouts, community, payments. Less is more.
hero.productSubtext: Track client momentum, revenue health, and engagement in one glance

workout.label: Workout Builder
workout.title: Build structured training blocks in seconds.
workout.subtitle: EMOM, AMRAP, circuits, strength — all native, all built for coaches who move.

community.label: Community Feed
community.title: Your clients no longer train alone.

messaging.title: Stop using WhatsApp to manage coaching.

payments.label: Payments
payments.title: Let the system run your business.
payments.subtitle: Integrated Stripe payments, recurring subscriptions and automatic billing while you coach.

desc.without: Disorganized coaching: scattered tools, zero automation, and time wasted on admin instead of athletes.
desc.with: Everything centralized in one place: clients, programs, payments and communication — in a single platform built for modern coaches.

steps.title: Launch your premium coaching <accent>in 3 steps.</accent>
steps.subtitle: You can be up and running in under 10 minutes. Promise.

step1.title: Create your free account
step1.desc: Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card required. Set up your coach profile, add your logo and brand colors.

step2.title: Invite your first clients
step2.desc: Send an invitation link via WhatsApp or email. Your clients download the iOS/Android app and join in one click.

step3.title: Coach, earn, scale
step3.desc: Build your programs, engage your community, collect via Stripe. You focus on your expertise — we handle the rest.

platform.subtitle: Jimmy isn’t a feature factory. We do five things with excellence — and stop there.

tech.headline: Not a hacked-together app. A truly native one.
tech.body: Jimmy isn’t a disguised web wrapper or a vibe-coding project. It’s a high-performance mobile app built by engineers, designed for stability and scalability. Your clients deserve an app as solid as your coaching.
tech.tile1Desc: Fast launch times, smooth navigation, and offline-friendly behavior so coaching never feels laggy.
tech.tile2Desc: Modern backend, battle-tested infrastructure, and best practices for data protection and reliability.
tech.tile3Desc: Built with feedback from active Hyrox, CrossFit and functional coaches — not as a generic template app.
tech.visualAlt: Jimmy native app held in a hand

comparison.title: The only platform that does everything.
comparison.subtitle: Every competitor forces you to choose. Jimmy refuses that trade-off.

pricing.promoTextBold: Lock in your rate before public launch
pricing.title: Pricing that scales with your roster.
pricing.subtitle: Start free with up to 3 clients. As your business grows, CLUB grows with you — and your beta rate stays locked for life.
pricing.sliderQuestion: How many athletes do you coach?
pricing.sliderHelp: Drag the slider to find your plan and price.
pricing.lockNote: Your −15% beta rate is locked for life — even after public launch — as long as your subscription stays active.

beta.title:
You’re not buying a product.

You’re co-building a platform.
beta.body: Jimmy is in Beta. Not all features are available yet — and that’s exactly why now is the right time to join. Your feedback shapes the product. Your requests become features.

card3.title: New features every week

team.title: The humans behind Jimmy.
team.subtitle: A small team. A big vision. Built by coaches, for coaches.

members.name: Quentin Randis
members.bio: Online fitness coach for 5+ years with 250+ clients. Established audience in modern fitness (Hyrox, functional, athletic conditioning). Built Athletic Reset, Athletic Protocol and Sync.

members.name: Nazar Moroz
members.bio: Full-stack developer and lead engineer. Stack: React, Expo, Supabase, Mux, Stripe Connect. Focus on architecture, performance, real-time systems and security. Based in Valencia, Spain.

faq.title: Everything you’ve been wondering.

items.question: What exactly is Jimmy?
items.answer: Jimmy is the retention platform for modern fitness coaches. It centralizes structured workouts, a Skool-style community, 1:1 messaging, payments and courses into a single native iOS/Android app — so your clients don’t just train, they belong.

items.question: Do my clients get an app with my branding?
items.answer: Yes. On the Club plan your clients download a premium white-label app with your logo and brand colors. It looks and feels like your own product — because it is.

items.question: What does it actually cost?
items.answer: Start free with up to 3 clients, forever. The Club plan starts at €29/mo (€24.65/mo with the beta −15% locked for life) and scales with your client count. Transaction fees drop as you grow.

items.question: It’s in Beta — what does that mean concretely?
items.answer: Not every feature is shipped yet, and you get a front-row seat. You’re in a private Discord with the founders, you vote on the roadmap, and you lock in −15% for life. New features ship every week.

items.question: Is my data and my clients’ data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Jimmy is built on a scalable, secure architecture with industry-standard encryption and a privacy-first approach. Payments run through Stripe Connect — we never store card data.

items.question: Can I migrate from Trainerize / TrueCoach / Skool?
items.answer: Absolutely. We help you bring over your clients, programs and content. Most coaches are fully set up in under 10 minutes — and our team is on Discord if you need a hand.

faq.footLink: Talk to the founders on Discord

manifesto.label: Our Manifesto
manifesto.body: We believe the future of fitness belongs to independent coaches who build engaged communities — not faceless franchises delivering PDFs.

finalCta.subtitle: No credit card. No 14-day limited trial. Just a platform built for coaches who really want to scale.
finalCta.socialProof: Join the coaches building Jimmy with us.
finalCta.trustText: No commitment · No credit card · -15% for life for beta coaches
